mapper.select: SELECT m.api_model AS apiModel, m.provider_code AS providerCode, p.provider_name AS providerName, m.max_context_tokens AS maxContextTokens, m.max_output_tokens AS maxOutputTokens, m.priority AS priority FROM ai_model_config m INNER JOIN ai_provider_config p ON p.provider_code = m.provider_code AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.enabled = TRUE WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND m.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY m.priority ASC, m.update_time DESC, m.id DESC
